That indicates that in the last 20 steps, legs contacted ground only 10% of the time, so likely not both legs contacting at termination. Also, the lander is not near pad: final distance 0.356, but pad proximity flag? Not given. Likely not very close.

Given the high horizontal speed and moderate distance, this is not a success-like landing. It shows approach progress but unstable final state. The rule label says partial_progress, which seems appropriate. There is no conflict. The evidence supports partial_progress with a detail like "moving sideways fast", "unstable horizontal speed".
